data.arabic_text: ((بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ، وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكَ، وَجَمَعَ بَيْنَكُمَا فِي خَيْرٍ)).
data.english_text: (May Allah bless for you (your spouse) and bless you, and may He unite both of you in goodness.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Barakal-lahu lak, wabaraka AAalayk, wajamaAAa baynakuma fee khayr.)
